1.name: Peasant Rabble
1.desc: Disorganized villagers and desperate bandits. A warm-up fight.

2.name: Hardened Warriors
2.desc: Seasoned fighters — organized tactics, decent gear, first healers.

3.name: Elite Forces
3.desc: Veterans with quality gear, strong magic, and cunning tactics.

4.name: Champions
4.desc: Legendary fighters, master tacticians, top-tier spells. Victory not guaranteed.

5.name: World Enders
5.desc: Ancient powers, catastrophic spells, absolute tactics. Survival is a miracle.
